case_title: PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC VS. DOUGLAS R MASON ET AL

EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT MASON, DOUGLAS R
